contrast.contextMeaning: The difference is very easy to see now
contrast.sentence: The contrast becomes very clear now.

becomes.contextMeaning: The difference starts to be very easy to see
becomes.sentence: The contrast becomes very clear now.

clear.contextMeaning: The difference is easy to understand now
clear.sentence: The contrast becomes very clear now.

fresher.contextMeaning: White wines taste more cool and lively
fresher.sentence: Near the coast, slower ripening helps keep acidity, so white wines taste fresher.

fuller.contextMeaning: The wine feels rounder and has more taste
fuller.sentence: In the warmer inland valley, fuller ripening helps build color and tannin, so red wines feel stronger.

build.simpleMeaning: Make something grow or get stronger
build.contextMeaning: The valley helps make the wine stronger
build.sentence: In the warmer inland valley, fuller ripening helps build color and tannin, so red wines feel stronger.

magic.simpleMeaning: Something that seems impossible and surprising
magic.contextMeaning: Something special, not a trick or spell
magic.sentence: This is not magic, and it is not only the grape.

only.contextMeaning: Just the grape, not something else too
only.sentence: This is not magic, and it is not only the grape.

create.contextMeaning: To make the right situation happen
create.sentence: Climate and landscape create the conditions.

conditions.simpleMeaning: The things around that help or hurt
conditions.contextMeaning: The weather and land that help the grape grow
conditions.sentence: Climate and landscape create the conditions.

then.contextMeaning: After that, the grape does something
then.sentence: The grape then reacts to those conditions.

reacts.contextMeaning: The grape changes because of those things
reacts.sentence: The grape then reacts to those conditions.

southwest.simpleMeaning: The direction between south and west
southwest.contextMeaning: The part of Bulgaria in the lower left area
southwest.sentence: Southwest Bulgaria adds another chapter to the story.

adds.contextMeaning: Brings one more part to the story
adds.sentence: Southwest Bulgaria adds another chapter to the story.

chapter.simpleMeaning: One part of a story or book
chapter.contextMeaning: One more part of the story
chapter.sentence: Southwest Bulgaria adds another chapter to the story.

warm.contextMeaning: The weather is not cold; it feels nice and hot
warm.sentence: The Struma Valley has warm weather with Mediterranean influence.

mediterranean.simpleMeaning: From the sea near southern Europe
mediterranean.contextMeaning: Coming from the warm sea area nearby
mediterranean.sentence: The Struma Valley has warm weather with Mediterranean influence.

influence.simpleMeaning: A thing that changes something else
influence.contextMeaning: A nearby thing changes the weather or taste
influence.sentence: The Struma Valley has warm weather with Mediterranean influence.

strongly.simpleMeaning: Very much, with a lot of power
strongly.sentence: This region is strongly linked with Melnik.

linked.sentence: This region is strongly linked with Melnik.

melnik.contextMeaning: A town or area famous for wine
melnik.sentence: This region is strongly linked with Melnik.

vineyards.simpleMeaning: Places where grapes grow for making wine
vineyards.contextMeaning: Places where grapes grow, where people talk about Melnik 55
vineyards.sentence: In many vineyards, people also talk about Melnik 55.

still.contextMeaning: They can keep their structure now, but are usually not as heavy
still.sentence: They can still have structure, but they are usually not as heavy.

as.contextMeaning: Used to compare how heavy they are
as.sentence: They can still have structure, but they are usually not as heavy.

instead.simpleMeaning: In place of that; another choice
instead.contextMeaning: In place of that, they may show pepper and bright acidity
instead.sentence: Instead, they may show pepper, bright acidity, and a more elegant body.

pepper.simpleMeaning: A hot, spicy taste from a small black powder
pepper.contextMeaning: A spicy taste or smell in the wine
pepper.sentence: Instead, they may show pepper, bright acidity, and a more elegant body.

elegant.sentence: Instead, they may show pepper, bright acidity, and a more elegant body.

body.simpleMeaning: How full and strong something feels
body.contextMeaning: How full and heavy the wine feels in your mouth
body.sentence: Instead, they may show pepper, bright acidity, and a more elegant body.

difference.simpleMeaning: How two things are not the same
difference.contextMeaning: How these wines are not the same
difference.sentence: That difference matters when people choose a wine.

choose.sentence: That difference matters when people choose a wine.

someone.contextMeaning: A person who wants a bold, dark red
someone.sentence: Someone who wants a bold, dark red may prefer Mavrud.

who.contextMeaning: Used to talk about the person wanting that wine
who.sentence: Someone who wants a bold, dark red may prefer Mavrud.

wants.contextMeaning: Likes or needs a bold, dark red wine
wants.sentence: Someone who wants a bold, dark red may prefer Mavrud.

bold.sentence: Someone who wants a bold, dark red may prefer Mavrud.

prefer.simpleMeaning: Like one thing more than another
prefer.contextMeaning: Like Mavrud more than other wines
prefer.sentence: Someone who wants a bold, dark red may prefer Mavrud.

spice.simpleMeaning: A strong taste from plants or seeds
spice.contextMeaning: A warm, lively taste in the wine
spice.sentence: Someone who wants a red with energy and spice may enjoy Melnik 55 more.

northwest.simpleMeaning: The upper left part of a place
northwest.contextMeaning: The upper left part of Bulgaria
northwest.sentence: In northwest Bulgaria, Gamza offers another contrast.

gamza.simpleMeaning: A kind of grape used for wine
gamza.contextMeaning: A Bulgarian wine made from a special grape
gamza.sentence: In northwest Bulgaria, Gamza offers another contrast.

offers.sentence: In northwest Bulgaria, Gamza offers another contrast.

lighter.contextMeaning: Less strong and easier to drink
lighter.sentence: Gamza wines are often lighter and fresher than Mavrud.

than.contextMeaning: Used to compare Gamza with Mavrud
than.sentence: Gamza wines are often lighter and fresher than Mavrud.

lively.sentence: So even Bulgarian red wines can move from light and lively to deep and powerful.

winemakers.sentence: Winemakers also make choices after the grapes arrive.

choices.contextMeaning: Decisions they make about the wine
choices.sentence: Winemakers also make choices after the grapes arrive.

after.contextMeaning: When the grapes come first, then they decide
after.sentence: Winemakers also make choices after the grapes arrive.

arrive.sentence: Winemakers also make choices after the grapes arrive.

some.contextMeaning: A few winemakers use oak barrels
some.sentence: Some use oak barrels for ageing.

oak.contextMeaning: Wood from a tree used for barrels
oak.sentence: Some use oak barrels for ageing.

barrels.simpleMeaning: Big round containers for storing drinks
barrels.sentence: Some use oak barrels for ageing.

ageing.simpleMeaning: Keeping something for a long time to change it
ageing.contextMeaning: Letting wine rest and change over time
ageing.sentence: Some use oak barrels for ageing.

add.sentence: Oak can add spice, smoke, or a softer texture.

smoke.simpleMeaning: Hot air and tiny black bits from fire
smoke.contextMeaning: A smoky taste or smell added to the wine
smoke.sentence: Oak can add spice, smoke, or a softer texture.

softer.contextMeaning: Less sharp and easier to feel in the mouth
softer.sentence: Oak can add spice, smoke, or a softer texture.

texture.simpleMeaning: How something feels when you touch or eat it
texture.contextMeaning: How the wine feels in your mouth
texture.sentence: Oak can add spice, smoke, or a softer texture.

others.simpleMeaning: More people or things, not these ones
others.contextMeaning: Some other people or methods do this instead
others.sentence: Others use lees ageing, where wine rests on dead yeast cells after fermentation.

lees.contextMeaning: Dead yeast bits left after making the wine
lees.sentence: Others use lees ageing, where wine rests on dead yeast cells after fermentation.

where.simpleMeaning: A word for place or situation
where.contextMeaning: In this method, the wine stays on dead yeast
where.sentence: Others use lees ageing, where wine rests on dead yeast cells after fermentation.

rests.simpleMeaning: Stays still and does not move
rests.contextMeaning: The wine stays there for a while
rests.sentence: Others use lees ageing, where wine rests on dead yeast cells after fermentation.

dead.contextMeaning: The yeast is no longer alive
dead.sentence: Others use lees ageing, where wine rests on dead yeast cells after fermentation.

yeast.simpleMeaning: Tiny living thing used to make bread or drink
yeast.contextMeaning: Tiny living bits that help make wine
yeast.sentence: Others use lees ageing, where wine rests on dead yeast cells after fermentation.

cells.simpleMeaning: Very tiny parts that make living things
cells.sentence: Others use lees ageing, where wine rests on dead yeast cells after fermentation.

fermentation.simpleMeaning: When tiny things change sugar into alcohol
fermentation.contextMeaning: The time when sugar changes into wine alcohol
fermentation.sentence: Others use lees ageing, where wine rests on dead yeast cells after fermentation.

rounder.simpleMeaning: More smooth and full, not sharp
rounder.contextMeaning: The wine feels smoother and fuller in the mouth
rounder.sentence: That can make a wine feel rounder and fuller.

erase.simpleMeaning: Take away so it is gone
erase.contextMeaning: These choices do not remove the place’s taste
erase.sentence: These choices are important, but they do not erase the region.

sets.contextMeaning: The place decides the first main style
sets.sentence: Place usually sets the direction first.

direction.contextMeaning: The main style or path the wine follows
direction.sentence: Place usually sets the direction first.

looks.contextMeaning: Checks the two bottles with her eyes
looks.sentence: So when Elena looks at those two bottles in Sofia, she can read more than the grape name.

read.simpleMeaning: Look at words and know them
read.contextMeaning: Understand more than just the grape name
read.sentence: So when Elena looks at those two bottles in Sofia, she can read more than the grape name.

name.contextMeaning: The grape type written on the bottle
name.sentence: So when Elena looks at those two bottles in Sofia, she can read more than the grape name.

promise.simpleMeaning: Make you think something will happen
promise.contextMeaning: Seem like it will taste fresh
promise.sentence: A coastal white from Dimyat or Red Misket may promise freshness.

freshness.sentence: A coastal white from Dimyat or Red Misket may promise freshness.

suggest.simpleMeaning: Give a small idea about something
suggest.contextMeaning: Seem to show strength and age well
suggest.sentence: A Thracian Mavrud may suggest power and ageing potential.

power.sentence: A Thracian Mavrud may suggest power and ageing potential.

potential.contextMeaning: Ability to get better with time
potential.sentence: A Thracian Mavrud may suggest power and ageing potential.

point.contextMeaning: Seem to show spice and grace
point.sentence: A Struma Valley Melnik may point to spice and elegance.

elegance.sentence: A Struma Valley Melnik may point to spice and elegance.

label.sentence: The label becomes easier to understand when the geography becomes part of the story.

easier.sentence: The label becomes easier to understand when the geography becomes part of the story.

understand.contextMeaning: Know the meaning of the label
understand.sentence: The label becomes easier to understand when the geography becomes part of the story.

lovers.sentence: That is why wine lovers often start with the place.

showed.sentence: Today, Bulgaria showed us a simple lesson with a clear result.

lesson.contextMeaning: A simple idea Bulgaria teaches us here
lesson.sentence: Today, Bulgaria showed us a simple lesson with a clear result.

result.simpleMeaning: What happens after something is done
result.contextMeaning: The final thing we can see after this
result.sentence: Today, Bulgaria showed us a simple lesson with a clear result.

protect.contextMeaning: To help keep the freshness safe
protect.sentence: The Black Sea coast can protect freshness.

see.contextMeaning: To look at the label and notice it
see.sentence: When you see a Bulgarian wine label now, you have a better chance to imagine the style before tasting it.

better.contextMeaning: More able to guess the style correctly
better.sentence: When you see a Bulgarian wine label now, you have a better chance to imagine the style before tasting it.

chance.simpleMeaning: A time when something may happen
chance.contextMeaning: A bigger possibility to imagine the style right
chance.sentence: When you see a Bulgarian wine label now, you have a better chance to imagine the style before tasting it.

before.contextMeaning: At an earlier time than drinking it
before.sentence: When you see a Bulgarian wine label now, you have a better chance to imagine the style before tasting it.

tasting.simpleMeaning: Trying food or drink with your mouth
tasting.contextMeaning: Trying the wine with your mouth
tasting.sentence: When you see a Bulgarian wine label now, you have a better chance to imagine the style before tasting it.

knowledge.simpleMeaning: Things you know in your head
knowledge.contextMeaning: Useful things you know about wine
knowledge.sentence: That is useful English, and it is useful wine knowledge too.

thanks.simpleMeaning: A kind word for helping or listening
thanks.contextMeaning: A kind way to end and show gratitude
thanks.sentence: Thanks for listening, and keep learning one clear story at a time.

listening.sentence: Thanks for listening, and keep learning one clear story at a time.

learning.simpleMeaning: Getting new things into your mind
learning.contextMeaning: Getting better at understanding one story at a time
learning.sentence: Thanks for listening, and keep learning one clear story at a time.

opening.contextMeaning: The first part that welcomes people

news.contextMeaning: A story about a person in a shop
news.sentence: [NEWS STORY] Imagine Elena, a traveler from Spain, standing in a wine shop in Sofia.

practice.simpleMeaning: Doing something again to get better
practice.contextMeaning: A question for students to answer and think about
practice.sentence: [PRACTICE] QUESTION: Why do many white wines from the Black Sea coast taste fresh?

because.simpleMeaning: For this reason; it explains why
because.contextMeaning: It gives the reason the sea helps the grapes
because.sentence: ANSWER: Because the sea softens heat and slows ripening, so the grapes keep more acidity.

softens.contextMeaning: It makes the heat feel less strong
softens.sentence: ANSWER: Because the sea softens heat and slows ripening, so the grapes keep more acidity.

slows.contextMeaning: It makes the grapes grow and change more slowly
slows.sentence: ANSWER: Because the sea softens heat and slows ripening, so the grapes keep more acidity.

what.simpleMeaning: Asks about a thing or idea
what.contextMeaning: It asks for the meaning of terroir or the type of wine

mean.contextMeaning: It asks for the meaning of terroir

shapes.simpleMeaning: Helps make something look or be a certain way
shapes.contextMeaning: The local things help make the wine taste and feel a certain way
shapes.sentence: ANSWER: It means the local mix of soil, weather, and landscape that shapes a wine.

giving.simpleMeaning: Making something happen or be there
giving.contextMeaning: It helps the grapes make more color, tannin, and strength
giving.sentence: ANSWER: Warmer inland weather helps the grapes ripen fully, giving more color, tannin, and power.

kind.simpleMeaning: A type or sort of thing
kind.contextMeaning: It asks what type of red wine Melnik 55 can make
kind.sentence: QUESTION: What kind of red wine can Melnik 55 produce?

structured.simpleMeaning: Strong and well organized in shape
structured.contextMeaning: The wine feels firm, balanced, and not soft
structured.sentence: ANSWER: It can produce a structured red with spice, bright acidity, and an elegant body.

change.contextMeaning: It asks how oak can make wine taste different
change.sentence: QUESTION: How can oak ageing change a wine?

notes.simpleMeaning: Small tastes or smells you notice
notes.contextMeaning: It can add small smells or tastes like spice or smoke
notes.sentence: ANSWER: It can add notes like spice or smoke and make the texture feel softer.

discussion.contextMeaning: People are talking about why the sea helps white wines stay fresh
discussion.sentence: DISCUSSION: Why does Black Sea influence help some Bulgarian white wines keep freshness?

effect.contextMeaning: It asks how the warmer place changes Mavrud grapes
effect.sentence: DISCUSSION: How does Mavrud show the effect of a warmer inland microclimate?

microclimate.simpleMeaning: A small area with its own weather
microclimate.contextMeaning: A small warm place changes how the grapes grow
microclimate.sentence: DISCUSSION: How does Mavrud show the effect of a warmer inland microclimate?

lead.contextMeaning: It asks if place is still the most important thing for the wine
lead.sentence: DISCUSSION: Do oak ageing and lees ageing change style more than place, or does place still lead the wine?

speaking.simpleMeaning: Talking with your mouth to other people
speaking.contextMeaning: A task where you say ideas out loud
speaking.sentence: SPEAKING: Explain the Black Sea chain in 2 or 3 sentences: slower ripening, higher acidity, fresher white wine style.

explain.simpleMeaning: Say something so others understand it
explain.contextMeaning: Tell what the Black Sea chain means in easy words
explain.sentence: SPEAKING: Explain the Black Sea chain in 2 or 3 sentences: slower ripening, higher acidity, fresher white wine style.

chain.simpleMeaning: Many things joined together in a line
chain.contextMeaning: A long line of places near the Black Sea
chain.sentence: SPEAKING: Explain the Black Sea chain in 2 or 3 sentences: slower ripening, higher acidity, fresher white wine style.

sentences.simpleMeaning: Small groups of words that tell one idea
sentences.contextMeaning: Two or three short lines of speech or writing
sentences.sentence: SPEAKING: Explain the Black Sea chain in 2 or 3 sentences: slower ripening, higher acidity, fresher white wine style.

higher.sentence: SPEAKING: Explain the Black Sea chain in 2 or 3 sentences: slower ripening, higher acidity, fresher white wine style.

compare.simpleMeaning: Look at two things and say how they are different
compare.contextMeaning: Say how two wines are not the same
compare.sentence: SPEAKING: Compare a coastal white wine and a Thracian Mavrud in 2 or 3 clear sentences.

choice.contextMeaning: The wine you decide to choose for the meal
choice.sentence: SPEAKING: Choose one Bulgarian wine for a meal and explain your choice clearly and politely.

clearly.simpleMeaning: In a way that is easy to understand
clearly.contextMeaning: Say your idea in easy, simple words
clearly.sentence: SPEAKING: Choose one Bulgarian wine for a meal and explain your choice clearly and politely.

politely.simpleMeaning: In a kind and nice way
politely.contextMeaning: Say it in a respectful, friendly way
politely.sentence: SPEAKING: Choose one Bulgarian wine for a meal and explain your choice clearly and politely.

closing.simpleMeaning: The last part at the end
closing.contextMeaning: The final part that ends the lesson
closing.sentence: [CLOSING] Today, Bulgaria showed us a simple lesson with a clear result.
